info.name: Asana Projects API
info.description:
The Asana Projects API allows users to create, update, and manage projects. A project represents a prioritized list of tasks in Asana or a board with columns of tasks represented as cards.

Contact Support:
 Name: Asana Support

request.description: Creates a new project by duplicating an existing project asynchronously.
